agreement.short_name: EAEU Unified Scheme of Tariff Preferences (Russia)
agreement.full_name: EAEU Unified System of Tariff Preferences (USTP) - Russia

notes_before_sheets: Per Module Register: Russia, Armenia, Belarus, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan share ONE module (identical English-language template/guidance content), but are 5 SEPARATE workbooks with their own tariff data - loaded as 5 separate agreements accordingly, not one combined record, since each may carry different rates per country even on a shared template.
notes: Eligible Goods List sheet (coverage_rules source) exists in this workbook but is not loaded by this handler - deferred to a future coverage_rules loading step. All 4 unmapped columns are now captured via unmapped_columns and appended into remarks by TextRateHandler, per the Unmapped Column Policy - nothing from this sheet is discarded.
